reviews.review_description:
It's just what I hoped it would be!

Great casual fun that's also perfect as an easy way for family members to try VR.  

No instructions necessary for the games themselves, as it's perfectly obvious how you play each game as everyone will have played them in before at some point real life!

Now to make a bit of space in the room to have proper go at the 10pin bowling...
I like the idea of this game. I just think that the graphics need to be improved to make it more realistic and I found it difficult to play skee ball and basketball although it was fun trying.

This can be a fun app but need adjustments and update.  Both skeeball and basketball very difficult to play well in the current version.  Please update.  For skeeball the front glass panel should be adjusted or removed as it interferes  with the proper ball roll.
One of the funniest games ever
